title.en: So, he was a little surprised.

content.en:
Ultimate Arcane is a technique that involves the Ultimate Extreme Arcane, which can be even more terrifying than the Ultimate Killing Move.

However, no matter how demonic an Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord is, he may not be able to comprehend the ultimate arcane.

The fourth assessment of the Doomsday Supreme Exaltates shows the mystery of the ultimate arcane in the simplest way, and if you can't realize it, you will never be able to realize it.

The Doomsday Supreme Venerable has left countless ultimate epochs in that inheritance land, and no one has been able to clear the fourth round so far, and Ye Tian is the first.

So, he was a little surprised.

"This son has the hope of breaking through to the ultimate supreme!"

Doomsday Supreme said.

"That's not good. Shadow Killing Extreme Venerable smiled slightly: "Whether you can become the ultimate supreme or not, not only depends on talent, but also depends on luck, if you are unlucky, no matter how evil you are, you can't become the ultimate supreme." In the same era, we were not the most demonic ones, but we broke through, and most of those incomparably demonic Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords16 have fallen. "

"That's right!"

Doomsday Exalted didn't refute it, because it was.

......

"Am I the only one out of the room?"

Ye Tian couldn't help muttering as he looked at the scroll and the several ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters who were struggling in it.

And he carefully felt the knife that had just stood up, and silently felt the mystery contained in it.

"Ultimate Arcane, no, it's not a complete Ultimate Arcane, it's just a part of the power of the Ultimate Arcane, but it's still terrifying. "

"This trick is called tearing the sky!"

Ye Tian said.

After comprehending the move of tearing the sky, his strength skyrocketed, and he could already be called the first in attack power among the ancient level ultimate realm masters, but he could only use the power of one blow, and most of the strength of his whole body would be exhausted, and he had no combat power.

But if he is hit by his tearing sky, the ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord will definitely die.

Time passes slowly.

He was still comprehending this sky-tearing move, and gradually reached the time for the fourth round of assessment.

Airplanes!!!!!

Several ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters were moved, and they did not come out of the picture scroll, but were moved, which meant that they had failed.

Whoa!!!

After these ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters failed, they were then moved away, and they did not pass the assessment, so naturally there was no way to obtain the final reward.

However, they could take the Secret of the End with them, and the Secret of the End was a reward they couldn't have imagined.

Just after these Ultimate Realm Lords were removed, a phantom appeared, and it was a projection of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

"Little guy, you are very good, you can comprehend the rudiments of the ultimate arcane, have thirty percent of the ultimate arcane power, break the doomsday scroll, and pass the fourth round of assessment. As a reward for the fourth round of assessment, I will give you a reward. "

Doomsday Supreme said.

"Thank you for the Doomsday Honor!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

I saw that Doomsday Jizun waved his hand and gave Ye Tian a golden leaf.

"This is a treasure that I got by accident, and it should have some value to you. "

Doomsday Extreme Venerable didn't explain the usefulness of this treasure to Ye Tian, if Ye Tian couldn't even study the role of the treasure, it would be too wasteful.

Wow!

The shadow of Doomsday Exaltation is gone, but the golden leaf is still here.

He looked at the golden leaf, unable to judge its usefulness for a moment.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian also went out from here.

As soon as he went out, he sensed the gazes of many Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lords.

But he wasn't worried about the threat, no one knew what he had gained, and he didn't dare to attack him rashly, in case he was favored by the Doomsday Extreme, which Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord would dare to kill him? or snatch him, wouldn't that offend the Doomsday Extreme?

The Doomsday Extreme Venerable is not an ordinary Ultimate Extremity, but an Ultimate Extremity that kills decisively, and will really kill them, and even slaughter them.

Therefore, these Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters did not dare to kill him.

But.

They had already learned from the other Ultimate Realm Masters that Ye Tian was extremely likely to have passed the fourth round.

The Ancient Dust Extreme Venerable of the Spirit Ancient Capital opened his mouth and asked, "Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, I wonder if you have passed the fourth round of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable's assessment?"

"It's passed!"

Ye Tian didn't lie, he said truthfully.

"I don't know how the fourth round passed?" asked Gu Chenji Zun curiously.

"I can't say that. Ye Tiandao.

"After passing the fourth round, is there any reward for the Doomsday Extreme Venerable?" asked Gu Chen's Supreme Venerable again.

"This, Gu Chen's Extreme Venerable has to ask the Doomsday Extreme Venerable, I don't dare to reveal it casually. "

Ye Tian said.

Gu Chen's Extreme Venerable was speechless, did he dare to ask the Doomsday Extreme Venerable?

Ye Tian didn't reveal anything, and he didn't dare to get angry yet.

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, it seems that it won't be long before the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable can break through to the Eternal Ultimate Honor. Gu Chen Jizun said.

"I hope so!"

Ye Tian said, full of confidence, not panicking at all, and not afraid of Gu Chen's extreme venerable dealing with him.

In fact, Gu Chen Jizun did not have the idea of killing Ye Tian to seize the opportunity, and let Ye Tian leave.

After leaving this time, Ye Tian naturally 680 couldn't stay in the Spirit Ancient Capital, otherwise Gu Chen's Extreme Venerable, these Peerless Ultimate Realm Lords, might always be spying on him.

Thereupon.

He was going to find a secluded place to study the golden leaf this time.

......

The place where the Shadow Sands Exaltation and the Doomsday Exaltation are located.

At this time, the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable was very curious, "Doomsday Extreme Venerable, you actually gave that Ultimate Golden Chaos Leaf to that Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, it's really generous, that thing is of some use to our Ultimate Extreme Venerable." "

"Gadgets, although they are useful, I have been studying them for countless years, and they are no longer useful to me. The Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable can stand out from so many Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords, and it is also appropriate to give him some good things, maybe he will break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable in the future, and he will have to owe me a favor!" said the Doomsday Supreme Venerable.

"That's right, the place of inheritance of the Doomsday Supreme Venerable is very cruel, but the benefits are really given, if it were me, I would be reluctant to give such a good thing!" Shadow Sand Jizun said with a smile.

Soon after.

Ye Tian found a hidden place, and at the same time used other copy bodies to interfere with the sight of those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, except for the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, no one knew that he had come to this place with the Ultimate Golden Shield Leaf.

In the years that followed, he studied this bonus item here.
